subject: Launch Bonus Expires In ~60min…
body:
I just revealed the greatest offer I've ever made.

Here's what you get when you get 200+ copies of Money Models:

- ACQ Implementation Virtual Workshop led entirely by me based on the exact workshop we do in-person for $35,000 - I will be answering your questions while taking you through my…

- Proprietary ACQ Deconstraining Process where I guide you step-by-step through our entire deconstraining process to help laser-focus you on THE constraint on your 10x growth.

- Supply & Demand Amplification to reveal whether your bottleneck is demand generation or supply optimization.

- Find & Create Leverage by identifying exact constraints to get maximum returns on your effort… and my battle tested frameworks to help you realize it.

- Crystal Clear Personalized Implementation Plan showing exactly which constraint you annihilate first and my best tactics for doing it to help you leverage the most 10x growth you can.

- 12 ACQ Playbooks - My most detailed deep dive into all the profit-boosting business tactics we use at ACQ. These are PHYSICAL copies only.

- Closing Handbook - 64 pages on closing more deals
- Proof Checklist - 32 pages on better persuasion
- Retention Playbook - 42 pages on keeping customers longer
- Marketing Machine - 32 pages on ads without your face
- Lifetime Value - 32 pages on getting customers to spend more
- Hooks Playbook - 30 pages on turning eyeballs into interest
- Branding Playbook - 42 pages on truly influential branding
- Price Raise Playbook - 32 pages on getting customers to spend more money on the same stuff
- Promo Cash Playbook - 36 pages of ready to use promotions that work in every industry I've tried
- GOATed Ads - 36 pages of frameworks to make and scale the thousands of ads for this launch and everything else we sell
- Lead Nurture - 46 pages on actually getting customers to show

- My Custom Trained ACQ AI integrating over $28,000,000 of real-world consulting lessons, all my books, all twelve advanced playbooks, and my never-before-released writings to train a custom AI that…

- Finally Answers "What Would Alex Do In My Business?" Trained on my years of consultations, stats, breakthroughs, and results to show precise actions I would take in your business.

- Puts $28M of Real-World Consulting At Your Fingertips with realtime access to all identified constraints, designed solutions, and verified implementation steps from1000's of internal ACQ reports.

- Your $135,000 Answer Fine-Tuned An Instant based on the exact tactics over 226+ businesses paid $135,000 each to get…faster than it takes to make your coffee.

- Engineers Hyper-Relevant Solutions from having engineered solutions for 226+ unique businesses—from B2B Services to B2C Services to SaaS to Physical Products— chances are it will engineer a solution for business just like yours.

- Like Having My ACQ Killers On-Call for you 24/7 to attack your exact problem day or night. This AI has more real business wisdom than people get in their entire careers.

- Grants Access To The "De-Classified" ACQ Data Vault. This is the first time I've made anything like the business intelligence, data, and validated solutions at this level available to anyone. At any point. Ever.

Also Free: My Entire Launch Blackbook (200+ pages) with all the emails, texts, ads, video sales letters, the presentation itself, the agenda…everything we used to promote this launch that you can use to launch anything you want.

This goes away the MOMENT the live stream ends.

If you're on the fence, do it. This is two years of work, and thirteen years of trial and error consolidated into checklists you can immediately use in your business.

All these are free when you buy 200 copies of Money Models

You won't regret it,

Alex

PS - For big business owners: who want to work with me for free for six months Look for the one-time offer for 800 copies after you buy 200 copies

PPS - If you're worried about distributing the books, don't worry. I've got your back.

You'll get a code to give out 199 free copies to friends/employees/audience. They can claim theirs anytime over the next year. We'll ship it right to them (they just cover shipping & handling).

Books not redeemed by August 19, 2026, will be automatically donated to entrepreneurs who need them.
